title: cyperus eboracensis
intro: Cyperus eboracensis, also known as Yorkshire flatsedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus eboracensis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
